systemic_equation.strength_term: A_system = mix(S_stable_plus_score, R_stable_plus, S_stable_score, M_brain_direct_v22, R_train_v28)
systemic_equation.learning_term: L_system = mix(L_stable_plus, L_stable, D_feature_v22, B_plastic_v28, R_train_v28)
systemic_equation.system_term: M_system = A_system + S_system + R_system + L_system + R_system_sys - P_system
